programme.title: Fur Buying Event
programme.desc: Join Kent Maitland and fellow trappers as he inspects, grades and purchases, shed antlers and prime pelts

programme.title: Punching Trails
programme.desc: Join Scott and some good friends as they help punch trails in deep snow

programme.title: Cold November Set Up
programme.desc: Scott heads down to Valley Firearms to buy a compact dispatch rifle for the snowmobile. Then he hangs a lynx set and sets up the line on a cold November start to the season

programme.title: Hog Wild
programme.desc: Gary Bartels and Steve Holden take OATH registered heroes Clint Kelly and Terrance Flemons to Rock Water Ranch in Texas to do population control on hog

programme.title: African Adventure
programme.desc: The Ultimate OATH joins veteran Tim Crawford in South Africa with Cheetah Safaris for a bucket list safari hunt

programme.title: Rob Evans Memorial Bear Hunt - Part 1
programme.desc: Hosts Gary Bartels and Steve Holden take OATH heroes Master Sergeant Gilberto Tony Roman and Marine veteran Dave Kochmanski to Canada to hunt black bears with Harvest Lodge Outfitters for the inaugural Rob Evans Memorial Bear Hunt.

programme.title: Two Great Hog Hunts
programme.desc: fter participating in the Carolina Coyote Classic, John MacPherson is joined by Sean Casey of DNA Firearm systems to go hog hunting. Later he is joined by Adam Simpson for another incredible hog hunt!

programme.title: Hog & Coyote Hunting
programme.desc: John and Sean Casey help out a farmer who is having a problem with wild hogs, then it's coyote time!

programme.title: Monster Whitetails of Ohio
programme.desc: John & Beth head to Ohio with the owners of Black Widow Deer Lures, Andy & Janice. Janice harvests her first monster buck and Beth opts for a doe to collect some venison to punch her tag.

programme.title: Archery Buck
programme.desc: We join Dane as he harvests his biggest buck with a bow, and what makes this even more special is that his father JD is behind the camera

programme.title: North Carolina Buck
programme.desc: his week we join John \"JBone\" Rowland. You won't believe the buck that he harvests right outside of Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: The Reason for Monster Whitetails
programme.desc: This week we're hunting with our good friends from The Reason as they head out to try and get some monster whitetails.

programme.title: Carolina Dreamin'
programme.desc: This week, Steve Schicker travels to South Carolina to hunt with Pete Gutowski of Uslide Bowholder, this time for deer.

programme.title: Elk Fever
programme.desc: This week, we join Gerry Rightmyer as he goes on the elk hunt of a lifetime, finally getting drawn after 16 years.

programme.title: New Brunswick Bear Hunt - Part 1
programme.desc: This week the Forever Wild Outdoors cameras are filming in beautiful New Brunswick for black bear with outfitter Ben Savior.

programme.title: Deep in The Skinny
programme.desc: Capt. Nathan Chennaux reunites with old fishing buddy to put the new Towee Skiff to the test. Shallow water redfish beware!

programme.title: Cowboy Like You've Never Seen
programme.desc: Yes sir, Capt. Ed trades his Cuban coffee for some South Texas joe as Capt. Scott Null shows the Florida angler the saltier side of Texas.

programme.title: The Clam" Before the Storm"
programme.desc: Capt. Ed Zyak is joined by long time TV host and Banana River native Capt. Blair Wiggins to visit Blair's home waters to find the famed flats unrecognizable. Human impact and runoff have taken their toll, but Capt. Blair and others have a plan.

programme.title: Coastal River Chinook Salmon
programme.desc: Casting spinners and jigs for BC river chinook salmon

programme.title: Pacific Saltwater Bottom Fishing
programme.desc: Jigging spoons for BC coastal halibut and pacific cod

programme.title: Pacific Coho Salmon
programme.desc: Fishing lures and drifting jigs for coastal BC coho salmon

programme.title: Filling the Freezer
programme.desc: After a long 8 weeks the meat birds are finally ready for the freezer. Family and friends band together and join Ben & Nicole as they slaughter whats left of their chickens in hopes of being able to feed both them and Bens parents for the winter

programme.title: Winter Woes
programme.desc: Ben and Nicole have committed to a goal of self-sufficiency. Unfortunately, its proving harder than they thought. Homesteading isnt as glamourous as it may look online. Atlantic Canadian winters are proving more difficult than ever before

programme.title: Spring Cleaning
programme.desc: As winter thaws Ben & Nicole set out to tidy up the yard and prep the garden. With cleanup well underway they pick up a new honeybee hive in hopes of being able to pollinate their garden and reap some sweet, sweet homegrown honey

programme.title: Logan's Bear Blanket
programme.desc: Logan turns this bear into a rug

programme.title: Island Pheasant
programme.desc: Your host Steve Elmy is going to take you on an awesome trip to the most southern inhabited island in Canada for an epic pheasant hunt

programme.title: Sunny Skies Where the Dove Dies
programme.desc: Loaded with Kent shells we hunt a few different locations and share some tips on what to look for when you want to get out and sharpen your skills before the waterfowl season

programme.title: Arkansas Duck Hunting
programme.desc: The crew heads to the duck capital of the world with good friend Russell Roberson from Alpha Innovations

programme.title: The Midwest
programme.desc: his week Heath & Brandon head to the Midwest in pursuit of giant whitetails

programme.title: South Dakota
programme.desc: This week Clede Spooner and Matt Cowell head west in pursuit of two species they've never hunted

programme.title: Texas
programme.desc: Watch as Ted and Amber head to Texas for some prairie dog and hog hunting

programme.title: Nighttime Raccoon
programme.desc: The Green Way Outdoors team heads over to their friends at Jank's Pheasant Farm. They are having serious issues with raccoons killing their pheasants. So the guys do a a night time raccoon hunt in exchange for a little pheasant hunting

programme.title: Early Season Canada Goose
programme.desc: Kyle & Jeff meet up with their buddy Ray Hoody for the early Canada goose season in Michigan

programme.title: South Dakota Pheasant & Jumping Asian Carp
programme.desc: The Green Way Outdoors team head to the pheasant capital of America, South Dakota. They hunt for pheasants and then head to the Missouri River to partake in some aerial Asian carp bowfishing!

programme.title: Operation Elk
programme.desc: September is elk season in the Rockies and the boys are in search of their biggest bulls yet.

programme.title: Crazy Rut Hunting
programme.desc: November, the rut is on, and the Grigsby is home to some of the best whitetail hunting in the Midwest. Strap into your tree stand because you have to put the hours in to shoot a Booner

programme.title: Crazy Rut Hunting
programme.desc: November, the rut is on, and the Grigsby is home to some of the best whitetail hunting in the Midwest. Strap into your tree stand because you have to put the hours in to shoot a Booner

programme.title: Wildfire Devastation
programme.desc: Rich and Sandi talk about the wild fire on the line and show the devastation caused.

programme.title: Wood Day on the Trapline
programme.desc: It's wood day out on the trapline, and Rich and Sandi put some of the newly fire killed trees to good use. Then it’s off to check lynx and otter traps from last winter.

programme.title: The Eastern Cape of South Africa
programme.desc: This week on Americana Outdoors, we're on a journey back to South Africa where we'll take a look at a variety of adventures and what goes on behind the scenes on some hunts.

programme.title: Axis Hunting and a Waterbuck Adventure in South Africa
programme.desc: This week on Americana Outdoors, we're going to join Jeff Reynolds as he goes on a dream hunt for an axis buck and then we'll journey back to South Africa with Wade Middleton as he goes back into the field in search of a waterbuck.

programme.title: Hog Hunts and a Big Ten Point
programme.desc: This week on Americana Outdoors, we look at all the ways that you can hunt hogs and then we'll go on a whitetail adventure with Brian Flaherty of TenPoint Crossbows where he's going to encounter his best buck ever.

programme.title: Arctic Char: Tree River Staycation - Part 2
programme.desc: After a good night’s rest in the pouring rain, we head out early up river to the famous Presidential Falls and then back onto the hunt for an Arctic Char in full spawning colors.

programme.title: Lake Trout - Great Slave Lake
programme.desc: We take in the last morning of fishing before the long 300km boat ride home to Yellowknife, NT. The fish are not done yet and we get to show you what not to do, when battling a giant lake trout to the boat!

programme.title: Shore Fishn Northern Pike
programme.desc: Its September and Ryan jumps back into the boat with Captain Andrew Moore and they head out on another personal bucket list adventure for the elusive Inconnu and some giant pike.

programme.title: Fly Fishing the Grand Cascapedia
programme.desc: This week, Pierre and his buddy Pat are in Gaspesie, Quebec for some fly fishing at the legendary Grand Cascapedia River.

programme.title: New Brunswick Moose
programme.desc: This week, while Pierre is in Newfoundland, we go to New Brunswick to hunt some moose with JLR Trophy Bear Hunting

programme.title: Turkey Hunting
programme.desc: Pierre goes to the administrative region of Estrie to meet his fellow guide Samuel L'Heureux who will show him the basics of turkey hunting.

programme.title: Pure Passion Part 2 : Saskatchewan Black Bears
programme.desc: Join Brody and Amy Teale as they hunt and fish along the North Saskatchewan River with Pure Passion Outfitting.

programme.title: Pure Passion Part 1 : Saskatchewan Black Bears
programme.desc: Join Brody and Amy Teale as they hunt and fish along the North Saskatchewan River with Pure Passion Outfitting.

programme.title: Chasin' Whitetails: Manitoba Whitetail Deer
programme.desc: Join Troy Esau on an exciting journey as he tracks elusive mature whitetail deer throughout the Manitoba hunting season.

programme.title: Trophy Pintails in Oregon
programme.desc: Mario and the local Oregon guys get together for a late season hunt in the Pacific NW. They pull out the layout boats for some high-water tricks to shoot some trophy Pintails and other ducks.

programme.title: Cold Weather Ducks
programme.desc: Mario heads east to a few different states and ends up in Wyoming at the Weatherby Facility for a tour. To cap things off we get to head out on the river for a very cold and snowy mallard hunt, with a small side of honkers to enjoy.

programme.title: Wild West Ducks & Nebraska Snows
programme.desc: The FA crew heads out on the famed Columbia River in Oregon to chase some birds, miles of places for the birds to hide and some incredible scenery. Then we slide into a little trip we took to Nebraska to hunt with the guys at Whiskey Sloughs.

programme.title: Mom's Bear
programme.desc: Corey and his parents go bear hunting in the North Woods. It's moms first time chasing black bear.

programme.title: Moose on the Menu
programme.desc: Greg's hunting season doesn't go according to plan, but hunting seldom does. On this week's episode Greg and his good friends Kiley & Hailey Topliss try to fill their freezers with big game.

programme.title: Best of Season 6
programme.desc: Relive the most thrilling moments in Prairie Pursuit Season 6! Join our hosts Greg, Calvin and Mike for this action-packed 'Best of' episode like never before.

programme.title: The Bigfoot Mirror
programme.desc: Ryan Willis and Joel Porter visit Algonquin Highlands to perform a new tactic on their night investigation to summon a Bigfoot.

programme.title: Pennsylvania Red Fox Trapping - Day 2
programme.desc: Ken Patula and his trapping partner Bob, have found success on their Pennsylvania trapline. Among the beauty of the mountains and fall colors, they encounter some interesting characters that appear through the foggy, mountain mornings.

programme.title: Agri-Trade Special
programme.desc: Agriculture technology and innovations at the Agri-Trade Equipment Expo in Red Deer, AB

programme.title: Illinois Whitetail
programme.desc: Every pastor needs to get away sometimes. The Rev gets away to Illinois for some rest and relaxation, and to hunt for whitetail.

programme.title: Ice Fishing Wisconsin
programme.desc: We travel to two famous ice fishing destinations in the state of Wisconsin to fish jumbo perch and chase whitefish

programme.title: Deep Woods Alberta Elk
programme.desc: mbark on an unforgettable hunting adventure with Ryan and Corey as they pursue Elk in Alberta's rugged wilderness. Plus, Keith MacDonald scored an Elk of a lifetime!

programme.title: Giant Alberta Archery Moose
programme.desc: An intense moose hunt you don't want to miss! Join Ryan Kohler and special guests as they pursue Moose in a unique setup in the Alberta bowzone

programme.title: Alberta Draw Tag Mule Deer
programme.desc: Embark on an extraordinary mule deer hunting adventure in Alberta with Ryan Kohler, Corey Cook, and Taylor Thompson. Follow the action as they pursue Corey's prized mule deer and Taylor's exquisite velvet deer.

programme.title: Women in the Wild
programme.desc: Step into the untamed world of \"Women in the Wild\" and follow Danielle and Darcy, two remarkable women who fearlessly pursue hunting on their own terms.

programme.title: Air Ivanhoe Adventures
programme.desc: Join Scott Stirling and Merle Parkin on their epic fishing and bear hunt adventure with Air Ivanhoe. Experience the Ontario wild like never before!

programme.title: Hunter
programme.desc: In this episode, we embark on a captivating journey as we follow Hunter through his first two seasons of Whitetail Hunting and his debut Black Bear season

programme.title: Whitetail Bow Hunting Across America
programme.desc: In this episode, we join Kevin on his first velvet whitetail hunt in Kentucky. We then join Wade in Central Texas as he meets up with an old friend to hunt whitetails in the Texas brush country.

programme.title: Whitetail Rut in Texas: Feast or Famine - Part 1
programme.desc: Wade and Steve are going after whitetail during the peak of the rut. This episode is as unpredictable as a buck during the rut and we can't wait to bring you all the action

programme.title: Best of Sullivan
programme.desc: Highlights from Sullivan Whitetail Ranch in Texas!

programme.title: Overcomers
programme.desc: Carson Presti has two hand injuries that she overcame to return to her quest for archery. Crystal Gibson joins her and has her own battle after fighting illness for 5 months. Two strong women overcoming.

programme.title: Big Texas Deer Monsters
programme.desc: Blue Collar Adventures gives away a dream hunt to one lucky fan. The winner and his best friend go hunt the famous Sullivan Whitetail ranch for monster bucks

programme.title: Exciting Look Back at HECS Moments
programme.desc: This week we open the vault and take a look back at some exciting HECS moments from past seasons. In this highlights episode we'll enjoy the compelling journey in understanding how far we can push HECS technology.

programme.title: Albino Bigfoot Family
programme.desc: Ryan Willis and Joel Porter travel to Algonquin Highlands to visit a property where white Bigfoots have been seen since the 1930s to the present day

programme.title: Alberta Bugle Barrage
programme.desc: Dedicated outdoor producer's short films from around the globe

programme.title: Heindls Fishtails
programme.desc: We make a trip to Northern Wisconsin for some good ol' fashioned tip-up fishing with Jason and Ashley Heindl of Heindls Fishtails Guide Service

programme.title: Moose Camp at Poplar Point
programme.desc: Join Shawna as she heads to Poplar Point Camp to hunt moose with friends, the Fransis family.

programme.title: Whitetail Madness Marathon 2022
programme.desc: The most thrilling hunts from our whitetail archives

programme.title: Forest Fires
programme.desc: Hosts Steve Hamilton and Kaylee Klassen chat with John Davies and Byron Wolf about the ongoing fires across the country.

programme.title: Missouri Cats, Coyotes and Coon
programme.desc: Join Matt Burson and his son Ethan as they pursue their passion of land trapping a mixed bag of critters in the state of Missouri. These two men are skilled, and theyll share their techniques with you today as the fur starts to pile up.

programme.title: Gators with a Twist
programme.desc: We kick off the show with Blaine’s opinion on people critiquing other people’s deer on social media. Then we head off to Florida where Blaine finds almost 10,000 new acres to look for gators.

programme.title: Pork, It’s What’s for Supper
programme.desc: Blaine is still in Florida and is looking to add pork to the menu. We also go behind the scenes on a different show and show you the hunt, then how it REALLY went down.

programme.title: Alaskan Salmon Run
programme.desc: Larysa Switlyk ventures off to Alaska to fill her freezer with salmon and shares her passion of fishing with Mark who was there to help film but later couldn’t take the fly rod out of his hand!

programme.title: Season 3, Episode 7
programme.desc: We’ve got a C21 update with Tracey Wilson, as well as some of the craziest clips we’ve had on the show ever!

programme.title: Extremely Unleashed in Texas
programme.desc: Larysa Switlyk hunts free range aoudad in west Texas which ends up being more of a challenge than she expected. Then she takes a group of friends on a hog control mission out of a helicopter!

programme.title: Patriot Warrior Whitetail Hunt
programme.desc: Hank Parker goes whitetail hunting with the Patriot Warrior Foundation

programme.title: 100 Degree Honkers
programme.desc: Honkers", "shortDescription": "Brad guides Claudio and 3 clients to 200 snow geese on one of the best hunts he has ever been on. Jason then guides Claudio and 5 clients to 27 big Canada geese and 3 specs on a hot afternoon in early September.

programme.title: Bigfoot and the Psychic
programme.desc: Ryan Willis, Joel Porter and the team meet up with psychic medium Jen Abra to investigate paranormal energy in a haunted forest

programme.title: Spruce Tree Root as Rope
programme.desc: Some Native Americans used the root of spruce trees as rope. Tune in to see Ryan Marshall demonstrate the technique.

programme.title: The Importance of Tripods
programme.desc: The tripod is the most important structure to learn, as it serves many purposes. Learn how to build one with Ryan Marshall

programme.title: Cattails: The Supermarket of the Swamp
programme.desc: All of the cattail is edible, at any time of the year there is at least one part that can be eaten. Watch to learn how and when to prepare cattails

programme.title: Big Tracks & Heavy Racks 2023
programme.desc: Weve decided to wrap up fall with our fan-favourite, 90-minute marathon, Big Tracks & Heavy Racks. This year's elk and moose hunt compilation brings you some mega giants, courtesy of The EDGE, Line of Sight TV, Bushnell Presents Prairie Pursuit, and more popular series.

programme.title: The Perfect Hunt
programme.desc: On this hunt Daryl guides 5 clients and Claudio to 48 ducks and 48 geese to wrap up the perfect trip!

programme.title: Meet the Bennettes on their Multi-Species South Dakota Line
programme.desc: Tune in for plenty of excitement as Matt and Nancy Bennette run their trapline. Matt is an old pro, while Nancy is new to the craft. Nancys anticipation and excitement is palpable as she wears her emotions on her sleeve

programme.title: Sweetgrass First Nation - Part 1
programme.desc: Join Shawna as she heads to Saskatchewan to hunt Sweetgrass First Nation with Lance owner of Battle River Cree Outdoors. (Part 1 of 3)

programme.title: PK Lures Walleye Fishing
programme.desc: We do a little bait testing with Curt Reeff, owner of PK lures. First we fish on the Missouri River then we head north to Manitoba, where Bryan Bogdan and Kurt test out some of the same baits and color combinations on Northern Manitoba walleyes

programme.title: The Pipeline: Alberta Kool-Aid Mans COP28
programme.desc: "Derek Fildebrandt, Nigel Hannaford & Cory Morgan discuss; Notleys retirement?; Liberal speaker death watch

programme.title: Sweetgrass First Nation - Part 2
programme.desc: Part two of Shawna's trip to Saskatchewan to hunt Sweetgrass First Nation with Lance owner of Battle River Cree Outdoors. (Part 2 of 3)

programme.title: Hot Seat - Part 1
programme.desc: Dry field, lots of ducks and the best hide you’ll see this year! So much action that we had to split it into two parts. Don’t miss the first half of this epic hunt!"

programme.title: Whitetail Rut in Texas: Feast or Famine - Part 2
programme.desc: The rutting action in South Texas really heats up as Steve of Yamaha Outdoors continues his pursuit of whitetail during the rut

programme.title: Northern Saskatchewan Black Bear
programme.desc: "Calvin takes friends Luke Alberts and Darcy Lodoen on their first black bear hunt in Northern Saskatchewan

programme.title: Mayor Gondek Should Resign
programme.desc: Cory Morgan, Nigel Hannaford & Dave Naylor discuss; Does COP28 really mean a fossil-fuel phase out? Unlikely; Liberal Party's diversity not their strength this week; Something unhealthy about Canada's waiting lists for care

programme.title: Season 3, Episode 8
programme.desc: A statement from the head of the CBSA Union, Tracey Wilson provides an update on Bill C21 and is the Liberal government reneging on their promise to compensate gun owners for their now prohibited firearms?

programme.title: Fighting For Our Rights
programme.desc: We learn about what's been going on in the courts in an attempt to overturn Bill-C21 gun ban laws, what the government's decisions have been thus far and what the next steps are in the fight for our rights

programme.title: Ho-Ho Hamas
programme.desc: Derek Fildebrandt, Nigel Hannaford & Cory Morgan discuss; Scotia Bank: Excessive immigration numbers driving inflation; Ottawas E-car mandate; AB to continue fight against Fed's plastic ban

programme.title: Behind the Blend - Juan Lopez
programme.desc: Sean sits down with Juan Lopez of Gurka Cigars. Gurkha has several brands that cater to every premium cigar smoker, including the very elite. For many, Gurkha cigars are seen as a status symbol and are synonymous with sumptuousness and exclusivity. However, a beautifully handcrafted and aromatic cigar can be enjoyed by anyone and embodies the pleasure and enjoyment of all good things found in life.

programme.title: Women of the PCA - Documentary
programme.desc: A newly released documentary, "Women of the PCA," filmed partly in Tampa, Florida, spotlights the growing influence and passion of women within the traditionally male-dominated premium cigar industry. Through insightful interviews with key figures of the Women of PCA (Premium Cigar Association) and footage from events held in Tampa

programme.title: Rocky Mountain Cigar Show - Dan Thompson, President Of Micallef Cigars
programme.desc: My interview with Dan Thompson, Micallef Cigars

programme.title: The Burn Down Podcast - Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Happy Thanksgiving! In this flavorful episode of The Burn Down, we’re sharing hilarious Thanksgiving stories and traditions, all while testing our new blend for the next cigar. Tune in for some laughs, great conversation, and a sneak peek at what’s coming next!

programme.title: The Burn Down Podcast - Cigar News
programme.desc: We’re reviewing the top cigar news stories of 2023 while taste-testing our new Connecticut blend cigar. From exciting highlights in the cigar world to the anticipation of our next blend, it’s an episode packed with great insights and flavors you won’t want to miss!

programme.title: Texas Cigar Roadshow - 88 David Skelton
programme.desc: I'm David with Texas Cigar Roadshow. Enjoy some cigar news, whiskey pairings, cigar shop stops and cigar tip and maybe the occasional Dad Joke.

programme.title: Burn Rate - Foundation Aksum
programme.desc: On this episode of Burn Rate, host Bryan Baiss is joined by cigar aficionados Jared and Alex to review the Foundation Aksum cigar. Together, they discuss its rich flavors, smooth draw, and craftsmanship, offering their insights into what makes this cigar stand out in the crowd.

programme.title: Unrolled - Jr Outlet
programme.desc: Join us for this episode of Cigar City Unrolled, as we explore the inviting ambiance of JR Outlet cigar lounge in Tampa, led by owner, Mike. As he guides us through the lounge, Mike shares his passion for cigars, highlights the unique features of the space, and introduces some of the most sought-after blends available at great discounted prices

programme.title: Behind the Blend - Juan Lopez
programme.desc: Sean sits down with Juan Lopez of Gurka Cigars. Gurkha has several brands that cater to every premium cigar smoker, including the very elite. For many, Gurkha cigars are seen as a status symbol and are synonymous with sumptuousness and exclusivity. However, a beautifully handcrafted and aromatic cigar can be enjoyed by anyone and embodies the pleasure and enjoyment of all good things found in life.

programme.title: Unrolled - Tampero Cigars
programme.desc: Tucked away on 22 St at the heart of Ybor City, The Cabrera family opened a boutique Cigar shop in 2014. Ten years later, owner Vladimir Cabrera reflects on his personal journey and family business while showcasing a vast selection of premium cigars from around the world. Tune in to discover why Tampero Cigars is a straight cut above the rest!

programme.title: Privada Cigar Club - The History And Flavor Of Pennsylvania Broadleaf
programme.desc: Join us on a journey to Lancaster, Pennsylvania, where we explore the history and cultivation of the iconic Pennsylvania Broadleaf tobacco.

programme.title: Privada Masterclass - Curing And Fermentation
programme.desc: In this episode of our cigar masterclass, we’re stepping into the world of tobacco curing—a process as much about tradition as it is about technique. It all starts in the curing barns, where the air is thick with the smell of drying leaves and the quiet rhythm of nature at work.

programme.title: The Cigar Guys Podcast - Weird Cigar Names
programme.desc: The Cigar Guys uncover some of the strangest cigar names they've come across in this special episode. From the bizarre to the downright hilarious, join the fun and decide which cigar takes the crown for the weirdest name of all time!

programme.title: Burn Rate - Bidwell Blend Ishi Maduro
programme.desc: On this episode of Burn Rate, host Bryan Baiss is joined by cigar expert Chris Kelly to review the Bidwell Ishi Maduro cigar. Join them as they explore its bold, rich flavors, perfect burn, and overall smoking experience, sharing their thoughts on what makes this Maduro a standout choice.

programme.title: Unrolled - Sterling Cigar Bar And Lounge
programme.desc: A hidden gem in the heart of Tampa. Known for its inviting atmosphere and extensive selection of premium cigars, Sterling offers both seasoned aficionados and curious newcomers a place to unwind. The episode dives into the lounge’s history, the art of cigar pairing, and the vibrant community it fosters.

programme.title: Behind the Blend - Bella Dama
programme.desc: Join host Sean Mobley as he sits down with the esteemed cigar maker, Bella Dama, offering unique insights into the meticulous art of blending and the dedication required to craft exceptional cigars. Discover the inspiration behind Bella Dama's signature creations and gain a deeper appreciation for the nuances that define a truly remarkable smoke.

programme.desc: Join us for this episode of Cigar City Unrolled, as we explore the inviting ambiance of JR Outlet cigar lounge in Tampa, led by owner, Mike. As he guides us through the lounge, Mike shares his passion for cigars, highlights the unique features of the space, and introduces some of the most sought-after blends available at great discounted prices

programme.title: Cigar Titans - Cigar Bro Code
programme.desc: This week we dive into a few touchy subjects when it comes to personal cigar time with your Bro's. Bring your notepad, this one's about to get started.

programme.title: Cigar Titans - Cigar Grooming Tips
programme.desc: In this video we go over a few ways to help freshen up after having that favorite stick of yours! We also announce the winner of the 250 count New Air USA humidor. Who's going to be sporting the new Cigar humidor, tune in and find out.

programme.title: Dreamer Cigars - Playing With Fire
programme.desc: Our fascinating guest is Craig Tabor, the owner of Playing with Fire BBQ Emporium. Craig is a published cookbook author with a second one due April of 2022, a food sport competitor, BBQ judge, BBQ teacher and caterer.

programme.title: Texas Cigar Roadshow - Ame Cigar Tour
programme.desc: On this episode we visit Kenny at AME cigars. During my visit to AME Cigars I smoked a Micallef Migdalia in a Corona vitola.

programme.title: Texas Cigar Roadshow - Back In Black Cigar Review
programme.desc: On this episode, I am reviewing Kevin Shahan's first cigar in production: Back in Black. This cigar was in collaboration with Espinosa Cigars.

programme.title: Rocky Mountain Cigar Show - Dan Thompson, President Of Micallef Cigars
programme.desc: My interview with Dan Thompson, Micallef Cigars

programme.title: The Burn Down Podcast - Cigar News
programme.desc: We’re reviewing the top cigar news stories of 2023 while taste-testing our new Connecticut blend cigar. From exciting highlights in the cigar world to the anticipation of our next blend, it’s an episode packed with great insights and flavors you won’t want to miss!

programme.title: The Burn Down Podcast - Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Happy Thanksgiving! In this flavorful episode of The Burn Down, we’re sharing hilarious Thanksgiving stories and traditions, all while testing our new blend for the next cigar. Tune in for some laughs, great conversation, and a sneak peek at what’s coming next!

programme.title: Burn Rate - Perdomo Lot 23 Robusto Connecticut
programme.desc: On this episode of Burn Rate, host Bryan Baiss is joined by Dr. Anthony Grant, owner of The Cigar Quarters, to review the Perdomo Lot cigar. Together, they explore its bold flavors, construction, and overall smoking experience, giving their expert takes on this standout stick.

programme.title: Unrolled - Florida Sungrown Farms
programme.desc: Join us as we take a behind the scenes tour of Florida's largest independent tobacco farm. Jeff Borysiewicz guides us through his tobacco farm, sharing tricks of the trade and everything that goes into the process of producing high quality cigar tobacco.

programme.title: Behind the Blend - Bella Dama
programme.desc: Join host Sean Mobley as he sits down with the esteemed cigar maker, Bella Dama, offering unique insights into the meticulous art of blending and the dedication required to craft exceptional cigars. Discover the inspiration behind Bella Dama's signature creations and gain a deeper appreciation for the nuances that define a truly remarkable smoke.

programme.title: Unrolled - Jc Newman Factory Tour
programme.desc: The El Rojo cigar factory is the oldest working cigar factory in the United States. Join us as we take an in depth look at what it takes to turn tobacco leaves into a premium hand rolled cigar.

programme.title: Burn Rate - La Rosa Negra
programme.desc: On this episode of Burn Rate, owner of The Cigar Quarters - Dr. Anthony Grant - helps our host Bryan Baiss rate and review the La Rosa Negra cigar. Join us to find out how this stick stacks up to the rest!

programme.title: Unrolled - Cigar Castle
programme.desc: On this episode of Unrolled, we take a look at The Cigar Castle! General Manager Rick is here to show us this unique lounge with a wide variety of selection and an impressive humidor!

programme.title: Behind the Blend - Drunk Chicken
programme.desc: Established in 2019, Drunk Chicken Cigars (DC Cigars) are handmade in the U.S.A. to create premium flavor profiles. Every combination of tobacco leaf, including the filler, binder, and wrapper, was chosen to produce an assortment of smooth, rich, and savory cigars with a variety of customers in mind. Join Sean has he dicusses the mission of the DC Cigars family is to produce premium cigars that can be smoked anytime of the day.

programme.title: Women of the PCA - Documentary
programme.desc: A newly released documentary, "Women of the PCA," filmed partly in Tampa, Florida, spotlights the growing influence and passion of women within the traditionally male-dominated premium cigar industry. Through insightful interviews with key figures of the Women of PCA (Premium Cigar Association) and footage from events held in Tampa

programme.title: Burn Rate - Henry Clay Warhawk Corona
programme.desc: On this episode of Burn Rate, host Bryan Baiss is joined by cigar enthusiast Jared to review the Henry Clay Warhawk cigar. Join them as they examine its robust flavors, smooth burn, and overall experience, sharing their thoughts on how this bold cigar compares to others in its class.

programme.title: Unrolled - Tampero Cigars
programme.desc: Tucked away on 22 St at the heart of Ybor City, The Cabrera family opened a boutique Cigar shop in 2014. Ten years later, owner Vladimir Cabrera reflects on his personal journey and family business while showcasing a vast selection of premium cigars from around the world. Tune in to discover why Tampero Cigars is a straight cut above the rest!

programme.title: Behind the Blend - Kevin Konscious
programme.desc: Growing up on Tampa's East side, Kevin initially viewed cigars negatively, despite childhood experiences racing through North Carolina tobacco fields and being intrigued by his grandfather's pipe tobacco aromas. The lack of Black representation in the historically white-dominated tobacco industry, even in the "Cigar Capital of the World," initially deterred him from pursuing a career in it.

programme.title: Unrolled - Cigar Castle
programme.desc: On this episode of Unrolled, we take a look at The Cigar Castle! General Manager Rick is here to show us this unique lounge with a wide variety of selection and an impressive humidor!

programme.title: Burn Rate - Foundation Aksum
programme.desc: On this episode of Burn Rate, host Bryan Baiss is joined by cigar aficionados Jared and Alex to review the Foundation Aksum cigar. Together, they discuss its rich flavors, smooth draw, and craftsmanship, offering their insights into what makes this cigar stand out in the crowd.

programme.title: Unrolled - Jr Outlet
programme.desc: Join us for this episode of Cigar City Unrolled, as we explore the inviting ambiance of JR Outlet cigar lounge in Tampa, led by owner, Mike. As he guides us through the lounge, Mike shares his passion for cigars, highlights the unique features of the space, and introduces some of the most sought-after blends available at great discounted prices

programme.title: Behind the Blend - Juan Lopez
programme.desc: Sean sits down with Juan Lopez of Gurka Cigars. Gurkha has several brands that cater to every premium cigar smoker, including the very elite. For many, Gurkha cigars are seen as a status symbol and are synonymous with sumptuousness and exclusivity. However, a beautifully handcrafted and aromatic cigar can be enjoyed by anyone and embodies the pleasure and enjoyment of all good things found in life.

programme.desc: Growing up on Tampa's East side, Kevin initially viewed cigars negatively, despite childhood experiences racing through North Carolina tobacco fields and being intrigued by his grandfather's pipe tobacco aromas. The lack of Black representation in the historically white-dominated tobacco industry, even in the "Cigar Capital of the World," initially deterred him from pursuing a career in it.

programme.title: Unrolled - Cigar Castle
programme.desc: On this episode of Unrolled, we take a look at The Cigar Castle! General Manager Rick is here to show us this unique lounge with a wide variety of selection and an impressive humidor!

programme.title: Burn Rate - Foundation Aksum
programme.desc: On this episode of Burn Rate, host Bryan Baiss is joined by cigar aficionados Jared and Alex to review the Foundation Aksum cigar. Together, they discuss its rich flavors, smooth draw, and craftsmanship, offering their insights into what makes this cigar stand out in the crowd.

programme.title: Unrolled - Jr Outlet
programme.desc: Join us for this episode of Cigar City Unrolled, as we explore the inviting ambiance of JR Outlet cigar lounge in Tampa, led by owner, Mike. As he guides us through the lounge, Mike shares his passion for cigars, highlights the unique features of the space, and introduces some of the most sought-after blends available at great discounted prices

programme.title: Behind the Blend - Juan Lopez
programme.desc: Sean sits down with Juan Lopez of Gurka Cigars. Gurkha has several brands that cater to every premium cigar smoker, including the very elite. For many, Gurkha cigars are seen as a status symbol and are synonymous with sumptuousness and exclusivity. However, a beautifully handcrafted and aromatic cigar can be enjoyed by anyone and embodies the pleasure and enjoyment of all good things found in life.

programme.title: Unrolled - Tampero Cigars
programme.desc: Tucked away on 22 St at the heart of Ybor City, The Cabrera family opened a boutique Cigar shop in 2014. Ten years later, owner Vladimir Cabrera reflects on his personal journey and family business while showcasing a vast selection of premium cigars from around the world. Tune in to discover why Tampero Cigars is a straight cut above the rest!

programme.title: Kayaking Kerala - Episode 1 - Part One

programme.title: Kayaking Kerala - Episode 2 - Part Two
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Second Life In Scandinavia
programme.desc: Hello from Sweden!We are on our way to the island of Orust. This island lives from boatbuilding, and big companies produce sailing boats here to expand their boats to the entire world. When the economic crisis stroke, demand decreased, thus less boats were ordered. This forced habitants of the small island of Orust to find a new path.Refit has become the new trend in Second Life in Scandinavia. Giving a new life to beautiful yachts, not only the economy is changing, but the local community as well. Lucia will venture into the island of Orust to learn more about the way its population has adapted and how it has become the mecca of boatbuilding.Watch out now, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Atlantic Cup - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the Atlantic Cup presented by 11th Hour Racing. Teams of two on a 40-foot race boat gather to race the East Coast of the United States. They will battle the elements and themselves for the right to call themselves Atlantic Cup champions. We will recap on the previous editions action before embarking on this new adventure. Are you ready?

programme.title: Colours Of Guadeloupe
programme.desc: Guadeloupe: the French overseas paradise in the southern Caribbean Sea. Clear blue waters, green vegetation and vibrant people bring out a whole rainbow of emotions in a limited island. Find out the true colours that wrap Guadeloupe with local guide Rudy as we dive into the cultural vibes of the country. From open markets to the local fishmongers and fishermen encircled by pelicans, Guadeloupe is full of secrets only locals know about. Rudy is determined to unveil them and share with us his passion for his beloved island while driving past the volcanic beaches that surround it.Get ready to meet local friends and hear their stories while discovering the Colours of Guadeloupe, now on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: P1 USA AquaX - Episode 5 St Pete Downtown, FL
programme.desc: Moving on from the Great Lakes Grand Prix, riders advance to St. Petersburg, Florida, for the last event of the P1 AquaX 2021 Championship. This event involves high-speed watercraft racing action, and competitors face each other against the clock to determine this season's ultimate winner. Start your engines and come race with us!

programme.title: Les Voiles de Saint Tropez - Episode 1
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Untouched Waters In Turkmenistan
programme.desc: Welcome to the eastern coast of the Caspian sea. Turkmenistan, Avasa, is known for its desert and not so much for its nautical resort. Nonetheless, Turkmenistan is hosting the PWA World Cup 2014 right here. Nautical Channel host Nikolai Berger explores the untouched waters of the Caspian Sea to discover the first time ever of the PWA Windsurfing World Cup. How will the best windsurfers in the world handle this challenging and unexplored location? Will Antoine Albeau’s brute force triumph again? Find out if the Caspian Sea can become one of the new exciting locations, with just the right wind conditions for this world class in Untouched Waters in Turkmenistan. Only on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: MAR
programme.desc: Surfing has ceased a long time ago to be considered a niche sport. As the mainstream industry discovers its potential for selling clothes, trips and a whole set of ‘lifestyle’ products, there are those who appreciate it for what it is in its purest form – a direct connection to mother nature.We accompany Big Wave surfer Alex Botelho and some of his friends to meet surfers who balance their love for the ocean and nature with a professional career in the sport. Mar is a tale of discovery, triumph and (almost) tragedy, but above all it is a life affirming pledge to positive vibes in and out of the line-up.Get ready to soak up a new conception of the world of surf as Alex Botelho unveils concepts unknown for the mainstream audience, available on Nautical Channel.Awards:Best Feature Documentary – Best Istanbul Film Festival 2021. Official Selections 2021: Ocean Film Festival World Tour, International Ocean Film Festival.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 6 - Rolex Middle Sea Race
programme.desc: The Rolex Middle Sea Race was co-founded in 1968 by the Royal Malta Yacht Club and the Royal Ocean Racing Club and starts and finishes in Malta. It takes place in October and takes the fleet in anti-clockwise around Sicily, Italy along 606 nautical mile journey, with sights that include the Strait of Messina, the azure clear waters of Sicily and the ultimate highlight, the active volcano of Stromboli. Tactically demanding, with famously changeable weather conditions, this is a classic test of seamanship.

programme.title: Les Voiles De St Barth - Episode 1
programme.desc: Marking the end of the Mediterranean yachting season, Les Voiles de Saint Tropez will be back for its 20th edition. Close to 4,000 sailors and more than 300 sailing yachts will gather in St Tropez in early autumn for an action-packed programme of competitive racing and lively social events.

programme.title: Kayaking Kerala - Episode 1 - Part One
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Kayaking Kerala - Episode 2 - Part Two
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: OFQUI
programme.desc: The Isthmus of Ofqui, unknown for many and chosen as surf destination by few adventurers.The stretch of land that separates the Pacific Ocean's inland seas, is the only way to make it if you want to surf the shores of Golfo de Penas. Connecting the Taitao Peninsula with the Chilean mainland, Ofqui offers world class waves. This thaw surf film approaches the vast territory of the Patagonia in different ways, this time, centered around Ofqui.Pro surfers will face ice-cold waters in their expedition to surf deathly waves in Ofqui, one of the most unknown locations of the Patagonia and with a microclimate that maximises the upcoming waves.Join them in their adventure to Ofqui here, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 5
programme.desc: Stretching 360 miles along the Pacific Ocean, the Oregon coast is well known for it's beautiful towns and dramatic shorelines. The coast itself is divided into three unique regions called the North Coast, Central Coast and South Coast. It has earned the name of the wild river's coast, and combined, it is an outdoor adventure travellers paradise with endless opportunities. Get onboard as we discover the Oregon Coast paddling with the waves.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 6
programme.desc: Located between Sweden's second largest city, Gothenburg and the Norwegian border archipelago of the Swedish west coast invites us to explore some of its 8000 islands. We'll also take our time to emerge in downtown city paddling and canoeing on a 150 year old aquaduct in Bohuslän. Facing Waves host, Ulrika Larsson, reveals her favourite paddling waters along the rugged granite coast in West Sweden during all four seasons.

programme.title: Coruña Big Waves - Highlights - A Coruña Big Waves 2022
programme.desc: The list of surfers who have confirmed their place in this championship includes João de Macedo, Vinicios do Santos, Ian Consenza or Antonio Laureano. Enjoy the best moments of the 2022 edition!

programme.title: Bart's Bash
programme.desc: The Bart’s Bash was created in an attempt to break the world record for the largest sailing race ever. Honouring America’s Cup great athlete Andrew “Bart” Simpson, this 24-hour race is compiled of thousands of sailors from over 60 countries set to take place at multiple ports. This fundraising race connects sailing communities across the globe and is sure to bring exciting competition all for a good cause. Sailing with a smile on their face, competitors rush across different venues raising money for the Andrew Simpson Foundation. The Foundations is driven by their belief that all young people should have the ability to excel and succeed in life and work, promoting health and well-being. Be part of this fundraising competition that yearly brings together thousands of people for a charitable cause.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Episode 7 - Rolex Sydney Hobart Yacht Race
programme.desc: The definitive blue water classic, which for the past 73 years has enticed, captivated and challenged sailors from around the world. The Rolex Sydney Hobart Yacht Race has become an icon of Australia’s summer sport, ranking in public interest with such national events as the Melbourne Cup, the Australian Open tennis and the Boxing Day cricket test. It starts from Sydney Harbour and the 628 nautical mile sailing adventure full of drama, spectacle and camaraderie which is watched by hundreds of thousands of festive spectators, is one of the sports iconic sights.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 7
programme.desc: Welcome sailors! The island of Krk is the largest island in the Adriatic Sea and today's destination. We are going to pay a short visit to the island of Rab where we'll jump into traditional dances and try out some of the local produce. Find out this beautiful location on Sail-Ho Croatia!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 8
programme.desc: In today's episode of Sail-Ho we're taking you to two very interesting islands. Cres and Losinj were originally a single island, but to make sailing easier they were separated with a man made channel. Then we will investigate why roasted lamb from Cres is so delicious before exploring intriguing secrets of the sandy island of Susak.

programme.title: Inside Sailing - Episode 5
programme.desc: In this episode we start our sailing journey from Malaysia. The Road & Belt Royal Langkawi International Regatta is one of the most prestigious events on the islands. This year, Malaysia's award-winning marina, Royal Langkawi Yacht Club has welcomed thirty boats across seven different classes and more than a hundred sailors for the first Asian regatta in 2020.Then, we leave behind the exotic island of Langkawi to discover the most epic shots from the world of foiling. High speed and adrenaline combine to provide the most impressive moments, and we've picked our top ten.

programme.title: Inside Sailing - Episode 6
programme.desc: In this episode, we take a look at how the how the COVID-19 pandemic has affected athletes and events around the planet. The GC32 Racing Tour has been fast to adapt and already started planning a future event. The GC32 Lagos Cup in Portugal has been moved to the end of August, the first stop in 2020.Later on, we take a look at how last season’s GC32 Racing Tour unfolded, witnessing some of the best scenes in the world of sailing.

programme.title: Route du Rhum - Episode 1 - Review
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Endless Summer In Norfolk
programme.desc: Norfolk: population to just over 240,000 people and neighbour of the Chesapeake Bay is one of the top nautical destination for many enthusiasts in the USA. Holding a strong historical heritage and home to the largest naval base in the world, nautical sports are practiced regularly in this city in Virginia. Nautical Channel host Lucia Metzbauer heads to Virginia to discover Norfolk and what makes it so important in the nautical world. A port city on the Chesapeake Bay, bordering the Atlantic Ocean and countless rivers in its backyard, you just can't get away from the water. Discover some of the incredible 144 miles of coastline in the heart of Virginia with Lucia Metzbauer.Get ready to live an Endless Summer in Norfolk on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Sailing Documentary Show
programme.desc: Sailing boats have always come in different shapes and size. Whether if they are used for competition, fishing or recreational use, competition has always been at the heart of sport, pushing boundaries in technological advancements.The Extreme Sailing Series combines the top class sailing teams and the advanced innovations in technology, and watching the races becomes a thrill to spectators. With circuits that range through eight global events, the Extreme Sailing Series is breaking boundaries. Follow the journey of boats that are some of the fastest in production and that can reach speeds of just under 40 knots or almost 75 kilometres per hour.

programme.title: Wakeboard World Championship - Japan
programme.desc: Welcome to Japan! The 2018 Nautique WWA Wakeboard World Championship is being disputed in Miyoshi City from the 30th of August to the 2nd of September. The top professional and amateur athletes are ready to take on the best waves and prove their skills to bring home the highest honor in wake.

programme.title: The Kayak Man
programme.desc: Another expedition? You must be crazy.This is what Beppe's friend told him when he decided to leave for North America. Even after paddling in the biggest rivers in the world, his desire for adventure was still not satisfied, and he went out looking for more. Dreaming of freedom, sleeping bags and nature, he ventured into the unknown to discover the Yukon and Teslin Rivers.For those unaware, the Yukon river is the major watercourse of the northwest of North America. It flows through the Canadian Yukon Territory and makes it's way to Alaska. The Teslin River is a bit shorter, but not for this reason less fun to dive into. They both offer an impressive scenery amidst cold temperatures, dangerous whitewaters and the wild nature of North America.The Kayak Man takes us on a journey of self discovery through the most beautiful landscapes of Canada and the United States while following the path of a brave kayaker that leaves his life behind in an attempt to explore new horizons by himself. An impressive trip that will not leave him the same way he was before.

Rudy is determined to unveil them and share with us his passion for his beloved island while driving past the volcanic beaches that surround it.Get ready to meet local friends and hear their stories while discovering the Colours of Guadeloupe, now on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: MAR
programme.desc: Surfing has ceased a long time ago to be considered a niche sport. As the mainstream industry discovers its potential for selling clothes, trips and a whole set of ‘lifestyle’ products, there are those who appreciate it for what it is in its purest form – a direct connection to mother nature.We accompany Big Wave surfer Alex Botelho and some of his friends to meet surfers who balance their love for the ocean and nature with a professional career in the sport. Mar is a tale of discovery, triumph and (almost) tragedy, but above all it is a life affirming pledge to positive vibes in and out of the line-up.Get ready to soak up a new conception of the world of surf as Alex Botelho unveils concepts unknown for the mainstream audience, available on Nautical Channel.Awards:Best Feature Documentary – Best Istanbul Film Festival 2021. programme.title: 3 Days
programme.desc: Telegram: SkarlavaIn June 2015 something that changed the history of surfing took place in Nias. For three epic days on the 28th, 29th and 30th some of the heaviest barrels on the planet exploded onto the Indonesian reef. This has resulted in 3 days of surfing madness in Nias, Indonesia as the bravest world surfers dive into the water to battle and catch some of the biggest waves.Featuring world known surfers Luke Dillon, Dave Rastovich, Courtney Conlogue, Anthony Walsh, Damien Healey, Matt Bronley, Justin Bu'ulolo, Alex Bu'ulolo, Jim Burgin, Antoni Dachi, Skeet Durham, Philips, Matt Younis, Rodrigo Sino Leonardo Kessa and more...Don’t miss out on 3 days of pumping waves and heavy barrels that will mesmerise you on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Durban Extravaganza
programme.desc: Durban: a coastal city in eastern South Africa’s KwaZulu-Natal province known for its diverse influences and for hosting the Durban Extravaganza. The City of Durban and Durban Stars have brought the heat to the beautiful beachfront with the Surfing South Africa sanctioned Pro Surf Tour competition. Over 3 three days, the top 100 surfers gather in the South African city to participate in the hottest surfing competition of the African country.You can expect high-level competition with waves that are over 2-3 foot in Durban Extravaganza. Competing at the Bay of Plenty, surfers will surely dive in for plenty of action. A fanta-SEA for surf lovers!

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 13
programme.desc: Today we are at the Miami Yachts Show and we will take you on board an Italian boat, the Garmin Navetta Absolute 73. Then, we will get to know a bit more about Scout Boats in the Miami Boat Show before trying out the Nuova Jolly Pronce 33 Sport Cabin. Are you joining us?

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 14
programme.desc: Boat owners aren't always looking for big yachts, but they always expect the luxurious. In the line of 55 footers, the Azimut 55 is probably the most chic in this category. After trying it out, we change of plans and move on two wheels to try out the Cranchi T36 Crossover. Finally, we go to the Miami Boat Show to discover the Grand Banks 44 EB.

programme.title: P1 USA AquaX - Episode 6 Review
programme.desc: The AquaX 2021 USA Championship season might be over, but we are still thrilled with the adrenaline lived these past months. It is time we look back at the most breath-taking moments of the championship, going from Daytona up to St Pete. Are you joining us? Relive the best moments of the 2021 AquaX USA Championship.

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 1
programme.desc: On this month’s show we will witness the first capsize of an AC75 caught on video as America’s Cup Defenders Emirates Team New Zealand took a tumble off Auckland Harbour. We also dive into the climax of the Brest Atlantiques which saw some of the greatest sailors race the biggest trimarans around the Atlantic. Next, we will update you on SailGP's two new teams for the new season and action from the Grand Finale of the Star Sailors League in the Bahamas. Plenty of end of season world championships have recently taken place - we bring you the action and the new world medallists from Kiteboarding, Windsurfing and three sailing classes.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 1
programme.desc: At 15 months out from the Tokyo 2020 Olympic regatta, the first major Olympic classes regatta this season in Europe, the 50th Trofeo Princesa Sofia Iberostar drew a record fleet to the Bay of Palma. For many countries, it was a key event for a selection. For others, an actual Olympic selection event. Let's dive in on this first episode of 2019 Sailing to Tokyo.

programme.title: Sailing To Tokyo - Episode 2
programme.desc: In this episode we are following the 2019 RSX European Championships. The 2019 RS:X Europeans and Youth European Championships which are being held on the island of Mallorca, Spain, is a record turn out for the RS:X Class with 333 confirmed entries from 43 different nations representing six different continents over five days of racing. This is not a challenge for the class and athletes alone, but also for the local host Club Nautic Arenal.

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the eleventh edition of the biennial race of Clipper: The Race of Their Lives. 700 participants representing over 40 nations will take on the challenge of dealing with whatever 'Mother Nature' has in store. They will battle the elements out on the world's greatest oceans and will experiences the toughest conditions imaginable: from hurricane force winds to squalls that can knock a boat flat. Find out now what will happen in this unique challenge.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Middle Sea Race
programme.desc: The 41th edition of the Rolex Middle Sea Race reunites 50 yachts at the historic Grand Harbour in La Valletta, Malta. They are all set for facing the challenge of circling Sicily, a truly mesmerizing adventure of unforgettable beauty. Be part of the Middle Sea Race of the 2020 Season.

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 2
programme.desc: On this episode we start a new series building up to this summer’s Olympic Games, and we will be looking at the favourites for medals in the 470 and bring you our guide to the sailing venue in Enoshima. Then, the Sydney to Hobart is a highlight of the sailing calendar but the 75th edition was particularly special with the largest fleet in many years. We tell the story of the race and hear from the winners.Later on in The World Sailing Show, the longest intercontinental race of the southern hemisphere gets off to a flying start. We’re on board Maserati multi 70 to hear how Italy’s favourite sailor Giovanni Soldini plans to win the Cape to Rio race.Also, for the first time in its 63 year history the Finn Gold Cup was won by a New Zealander – we find out how he did it.Come join us as we embark into the world of sailing!

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the eleventh edition of the biennial race of Clipper: The Race of Their Lives. 700 participants representing over 40 nations will take on the challenge of dealing with whatever 'Mother Nature' has in store. They will battle the elements out on the world's greatest oceans and will experiences the toughest conditions imaginable: from hurricane force winds to squalls that can knock a boat flat. Find out now what will happen in this unique challenge.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 1
programme.desc: Three times the size of Texas and the largest province in Canada, Quebec is a big place. It's also blessed with 3% of the world's freshwater, more than half a million lakes and has the enormous St. Lawrence River flowing through its interior, which empties the Great Lakes into the Atlantic Ocean. Breathtaking coastlines, crystal clear rivers and pristine wilderness lakes. This week on facing waves, we're exploring the regions of Gaspesie and Bas-Saint-Laurent.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 2
programme.desc: One of the most remote regions of Quebec is the Cote-Nord. A wild and wonderful place filled with new discoveries, like paddling with puffins and through rocks carbed by time. With more than 20,000 lakes and rivers and endless pristine wilderness, the region is an outdoor lover's paradise and dream destination for paddlers. This week on Facing Waves we're visiting Quebec's Cote-Nord and Abitibi-Temiscamingue.

programme.title: PRADA Cup - Round Robin 1-2 Week 1
programme.desc: Every match of the PRADA Cup is a one-on-one duel of strategy and tactics, and time is of the essence. The Round Robins will define who will pass directly into the final and who, on the other hand, will have to compete in the semi-final before moving forward to the final.The first to win 7 races will move directly into the final of the competition. Luna Rossa Prada Pirelli, INEOS Team UK and NYYC American Magic are the three contenders in this year's Round Robin. Who will move on directly to the final? Find it out, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Semaine Du Golfe Du Morbihan
programme.desc: The Semaine du Golfe Du Morbihan is an essential event for all classic sailing lovers. The Gulf Week is a maritime even set on the beautiful Morbihan Gulf, in Brittany, a French destination known for its gorgeous landscape. Expending on 35000 hectares, it is worth is reputation as the little sea. For one week, the Gulf will be letting more than 1000 ships rip through its waters. Rowing boats, lightships, classic sailing ships... almost 6000 sailors will take part in this year's edition. This joyful week has been organised in order to meet and share new experiences, so let's enduge in the best moments, most impressive boats and latest news of the 7th edition of the Semaine du Golfe Du Morbihan!

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 1
programme.desc: We arrive to the port to meet Chef Panos and invite him onboard to try a delicious recipe: linguine with shrimps. The Chef Panos will show us the Greek heritage in the food and a secret ingredient he uses to give his plates his own taste. Then, we go around the port to see whether if we can share this delicious platter with strangers. Then, we meet Chef Nikos to discover a special recipe he has for us.

programme.title: Semaine Du Golfe Du Morbihan
programme.desc: The Semaine du Golfe Du Morbihan is an essential event for all classic sailing lovers. The Gulf Week is a maritime even set on the beautiful Morbihan Gulf, in Brittany, a French destination known for its gorgeous landscape. Expending on 35000 hectares, it is worth is reputation as the little sea. For one week, the Gulf will be letting more than 1000 ships rip through its waters. programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 3
programme.desc: Connecting North America's Great Lakes with the Atlantic Ocean, the Saint Lawrence is one of the largest and most important waterways in the world. It's also home to some of the most diverse and inspiring landscapes, like Les Iles de la Madeleine, a breathtaking chain of islands with endless sand beaches, spectacular sea caves and a charming small town vibe. This week on Facing Waves, we're visiting Quebec City and Les Iles de la Madeleine.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 4
programme.desc: What makes Canada's largest provinces so great is how big and rugged the landscape is. This means there are endless opportunities for outdoor adventure. Less than an hour from the cities of Montreal and Ottawa, the Laurentians is one of the most accessible regions of Quebec and one of the top adventure spots in the country. This week we will discover the Laurentians and Authentic Quebec.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 9
programme.desc: In this episode we have arrived to Istria, a part of the Croatian coast considered by many as the real hedonist paradise. We will visit the antic city of Pula, with its beautiful Roman colosseum and the medieval town of Labin. Also, we'll introduce you to Rovinj, the most romantic town in Croatia.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 10
programme.desc: Istria is often called the Queen of Gastronomy, and to explore how much of that is true, we visited some of the top restaurants of the region. Then we explored the beautiful places near the Lim Channel - Funtana, Porec and Vrsar. Stay tuned on Sail-Ho Croatia!

programme.title: The Women and the Waves - Part 1
programme.desc: We begin our journey through the history of female surf in The Women and the Waves Part 1. The show is separated in two parts, as we explore the world created by surfer girls, women who surf, women who don’t, female athletes, and the men who love them. Get to know what it means to surf like a girl in this inspiring film that features generations of women surfers.

programme.title: Flavours Of The Sea - Episode 2
programme.desc: In today's episode, we are meeting Chef Dimitri who has a special surprise prepared for us. He will join us on our boat to prepare a unique fish soup, and we are ready to share this delicacy with the people in the port. We will also be meeting Chef Kostas who has his own recipe for pasta with tuna. Come on board and try it out!

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the eleventh edition of the biennial race of Clipper: The Race of Their Lives. 700 participants representing over 40 nations will take on the challenge of dealing with whatever 'Mother Nature' has in store. They will battle the elements out on the world's greatest oceans and will experiences the toughest conditions imaginable: from hurricane force winds to squalls that can knock a boat flat. Find out now what will happen in this unique challenge.

programme.title: Inside Sailing - Episode 7
programme.desc: Our journey starts this time with the wrapping up of the following 44Cup, a well-established series that is highly regarded in the sailing industry. Among the teams and sailors it attracts, Team Aqua and Peninsula Petroleum are the most loyal ones on the tour.Our next stop takes us to the leading kitefoiler, Florian Gruber who will explain how the COVID-19 virus has affected his daily routine. He would normally spend his time flying around the globe competing in the world's top events, however this is not the current reality. The final stop for this episode includes the top ten moments of GC32 Racing Tour.

programme.title: Inside Sailing - Episode 8
programme.desc: On this month’s show, we will learn how Covid-19 has affected the sailing industry and how one of the top sailing event organizers, Christian Scherrer of the GC32 Racing Tour has faced this exceptional situation. After, we will get to know Vasileia Karahaliou, a Greek laser radial sailor who qualified for the 2020 Summer Olympics, and find out how she spends her days in Athens.Finally, we will have the chance to meet British windsurfer Tom Squires as he prepares to live out his big dream by competing in the next Summer Olympic Games.

programme.title: Sailing to the Games - Episode 1
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing to the Games - Episode 2
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 1
programme.desc: Our DJ adventure is about to begin! Come with us as we pack our bags and leave for sunny Ibiza in Spain. After dropping our bags we are saying hi to David Guetta before trying out our skills as DJs and finding out how Ibiza's nightlife will surprise us. Join us!

programme.title: Sailing Deejay - Episode 2
programme.desc: Sailing Deejay continues its journey in Ibiza and the nearing islands to the rhythm of the night! Sam and Max are getting on more adventures, and while they sail during the day they party and DJ during the night! When will they get a chance to sleep and rest a bit? Let's get the party started, on Nautical Channel!

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 3
programme.desc: Connecting North America's Great Lakes with the Atlantic Ocean, the Saint Lawrence is one of the largest and most important waterways in the world. It's also home to some of the most diverse and inspiring landscapes, like Les Iles de la Madeleine, a breathtaking chain of islands with endless sand beaches, spectacular sea caves and a charming small town vibe. This week on Facing Waves, we're visiting Quebec City and Les Iles de la Madeleine.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 4
programme.desc: What makes Canada's largest provinces so great is how big and rugged the landscape is. This means there are endless opportunities for outdoor adventure. Less than an hour from the cities of Montreal and Ottawa, the Laurentians is one of the most accessible regions of Quebec and one of the top adventure spots in the country. This week we will discover the Laurentians and Authentic Quebec.

programme.title: Semaine Du Golfe Du Morbihan
programme.desc: The Semaine du Golfe Du Morbihan is an essential event for all classic sailing lovers. The Gulf Week is a maritime even set on the beautiful Morbihan Gulf, in Brittany, a French destination known for its gorgeous landscape. Expending on 35000 hectares, it is worth is reputation as the little sea. For one week, the Gulf will be letting more than 1000 ships rip through its waters. Rowing boats, lightships, classic sailing ships... almost 6000 sailors will take part in this year's edition. This joyful week has been organised in order to meet and share new experiences, so let's enduge in the best moments, most impressive boats and latest news of the 7th edition of the Semaine du Golfe Du Morbihan!

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the eleventh edition of the biennial race of Clipper: The Race of Their Lives. 700 participants representing over 40 nations will take on the challenge of dealing with whatever 'Mother Nature' has in store. They will battle the elements out on the world's greatest oceans and will experiences the toughest conditions imaginable: from hurricane force winds to squalls that can knock a boat flat. Find out now what will happen in this unique challenge.

programme.title: PRADA Cup - Round Robin 1-2 Week 1
programme.desc: Every match of the PRADA Cup is a one-on-one duel of strategy and tactics, and time is of the essence. The Round Robins will define who will pass directly into the final and who, on the other hand, will have to compete in the semi-final before moving forward to the final.The first to win 7 races will move directly into the final of the competition. Luna Rossa Prada Pirelli, INEOS Team UK and NYYC American Magic are the three contenders in this year's Round Robin. Who will move on directly to the final? Find it out, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The South To Sian Journals
programme.desc: While filming South To Sian, a pair of adventurers dived into what began as a three-month trip and turned into a two-year odyssey of exploration.On boards, bikes, by boat and four-wheel drive, Harrison Roach and Zye Norris discovered if, in these days of GPS and WiFi, the dream of a true pioneering surf adventure is still alive.South to Sian Journals is a collection of stories documenting the people, places & adventures that occurred during the 2 years making “South To Sian” - the challenges, the surfers, riders, shapers, bike builders, filmmakers and photographers.Extremely entertaining and insightful, “Journals” documents the travels, the hardships, the spectacular locations, the personalities and the thoughts of the characters, both in front of and behind the lens.

programme.title: Alpine Freestyle Kayaking
programme.desc: Graz, at the south of Austria, is a popular tourist destination as it has been recognized as a UNESCO World Heritage Site. The Mur River is a defining feature of Graz. It runs through a total of four countries: Austria, Slovenia, Croatia and Hungary.Graz is also the home of Austria's number one Freestyle Kayaker Marcel Bloder. Together with him, we'll be exploring Graz and the Mur River and joining him on his journey to the 2013 ECA Freestyle Kayaking Euro Cup in Slovakia.Join Lucia Metzbauer in her new adventure in Graz in Alpine Freestyle Kayak.

programme.title: Sofia
programme.desc: Sofía is a short documentary film about the life of young surfer Sofía De Tomás, Canary Islands’ surf champion. Originally from La Orotava, Tenerife, Sofia tells us through interviews and cinematic shoots about her surfing lifestyle and what inclined her towards the surf world.Sofia balances her time between painting and surfing, and for her painting has a similar effect sometimes as surfing. However, for Sofia, surfing is a sport that traps you, and once you start it, you can’t stop, you want more. It’s something she can’t live without.Live the beauty of the Canary Islands in this short documentary film about this young talent in the surf world. Sofia offers beautiful scenery, heart-warming moments and a strong desire to get on a board yourself and start surfing the world.

programme.title: Alacati Windsurf Mecca
programme.desc: Alacati is a town on Turkey’s Cesme Peninsula and for many a Windsurf Mecca. The town is famous for its constant winds and drives the attention of people who like practicing wind sports such as Windsurfing, Kitesurfing, SUP and many more. For years now, the small town is experiencing the impact of windsurfing in their economy, society and lifestyle as it attracts the attention of people worldwide that prefer the Turkish coast to practice water sports.Experience the Alacati Windsurf Mecca that will be sure to blow your mind on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 15
programme.desc: Today we are here to show you the new from Albemarle, its 29 Express, a very compact and easy running fishing machines. Then, we try the Suzuki DF100B before showing you the latest from Viking, its new 44C with a very clean and aerodynamic profile. Come join us!

programme.title: The Boat Show - Episode 16
programme.desc: In the United States, the challenge to build the largest center console has been won by Marine Technology Inc with a winning 57-footer. After testing it, we go to Fort Lauderdale on the HH55, a catamaran that can easily be defined as custom-built. Finally, the Catalina is one of the most successful nautical brands in the USA. We will get onboard its 355 boat.

The show is separated in two parts, as we explore the world created by surfer girls, women who surf, women who don’t, female athletes, and the men who love them. Get to know what it means to surf like a girl in this inspiring film that features generations of women surfers.

programme.title: Rolex Spirit Of Yachting - Ep.5 - Rolex Sail GP
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Semaine Du Golfe Du Morbihan
programme.desc: The Semaine du Golfe Du Morbihan is an essential event for all classic sailing lovers. The Gulf Week is a maritime even set on the beautiful Morbihan Gulf, in Brittany, a French destination known for its gorgeous landscape. Expending on 35000 hectares, it is worth is reputation as the little sea. For one week, the Gulf will be letting more than 1000 ships rip through its waters. Rowing boats, lightships, classic sailing ships... almost 6000 sailors will take part in this year's edition. This joyful week has been organised in order to meet and share new experiences, so let's enduge in the best moments, most impressive boats and latest news of the 7th edition of the Semaine du Golfe Du Morbihan!

programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: Wild Surf - Episode 9
programme.desc: - Array

programme.title: PRADA Cup - Round Robin 1-2 Week 1
programme.desc: Every match of the PRADA Cup is a one-on-one duel of strategy and tactics, and time is of the essence. The Round Robins will define who will pass directly into the final and who, on the other hand, will have to compete in the semi-final before moving forward to the final.The first to win 7 races will move directly into the final of the competition. Luna Rossa Prada Pirelli, INEOS Team UK and NYYC American Magic are the three contenders in this year's Round Robin. Who will move on directly to the final? Find it out, on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 3
programme.desc: Connecting North America's Great Lakes with the Atlantic Ocean, the Saint Lawrence is one of the largest and most important waterways in the world. It's also home to some of the most diverse and inspiring landscapes, like Les Iles de la Madeleine, a breathtaking chain of islands with endless sand beaches, spectacular sea caves and a charming small town vibe. This week on Facing Waves, we're visiting Quebec City and Les Iles de la Madeleine.

programme.title: Facing Waves - Episode 4
programme.desc: What makes Canada's largest provinces so great is how big and rugged the landscape is. This means there are endless opportunities for outdoor adventure. Less than an hour from the cities of Montreal and Ottawa, the Laurentians is one of the most accessible regions of Quebec and one of the top adventure spots in the country. This week we will discover the Laurentians and Authentic Quebec.

programme.title: The World Sailing Show - Episode 3
programme.desc: This month the World Sailing Show focuses on the thrills and spills of a decade of foiling with Sir Ben Ainslie at the INEOS TEAM UK training base in Cagliari, Italy. The British America’s Cup skipper looks ahead to an action-packed year in SailGP and the America’s Cup World Series. Then, we bring you action from the star-studded fleet competing in the RORC Caribbean 600 race - 700 sailors from 37 nations racing 600 miles around 11 islands. A year of Olympic sailing kicked off in Miami with the World Cup Series. We bring you the stories and action from the event that featured seven Olympic classes. Finally, Francis Joyon and his IDEC Sport crew concluded a winter of record-breaking by taking the Hong Kong to London tea clipper route record.

programme.title: Clipper: The Race Of Their Lives - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the eleventh edition of the biennial race of Clipper: The Race of Their Lives. 700 participants representing over 40 nations will take on the challenge of dealing with whatever 'Mother Nature' has in store. They will battle the elements out on the world's greatest oceans and will experiences the toughest conditions imaginable: from hurricane force winds to squalls that can knock a boat flat. Find out now what will happen in this unique challenge.
